# GSSoC PR Tracker

> The unofficial community tracker for GirlScript Summer of Code (GSSoC) 2026. Track contributor PR points, mentor review scores, and validate PRs — instantly. Built by PRODHOSH.

## What this site does

GSSoC PR Tracker lets GSSoC 2026 participants check their contribution stats without waiting for the official leaderboard. Enter any GitHub username to see all your GSSoC-approved PRs, your total points, your rank, and a breakdown of each PR's score.

Key features:
- **Contributor Tracker** — Shows all merged PRs with `gssoc:approved` label, calculates points using the official GSSoC 2026 scoring formula
- **Mentor Tracker** — Shows PRs reviewed by a mentor (`mentor:<username>` label), calculates mentor score
- **PR Validator** — Paste any GitHub PR link to instantly check if it qualifies for GSSoC 2026 points and see the exact breakdown
- **Email Alerts** — Subscribe to get notified when your score or rank changes

## Scoring formula

Contributor points per merged PR:
- Base: 50 points
- Difficulty: beginner=20, intermediate=35, advanced=55, critical=80
- Quality multiplier: clean=1.2×, exceptional=1.5×
- Type bonus: docs=+5, bug/feature/testing/design/refactor=+10, accessibility/performance/devops=+15, security=+20

Mentor points per reviewed merged PR:
- Difficulty: beginner=10, intermediate=20, advanced=30, critical=50
- Quality bonus: clean=+5, exceptional=+10

PRs tagged `gssoc:invalid`, `gssoc:spam`, or `gssoc:ai-slop` score 0 points.

Only PRs in the 421 officially registered GSSoC 2026 repositories count. PRs in unofficial repos are shown but marked as Disqualified (0 points).

## Technical architecture

- **Framework**: Next.js 16 (App Router, server components)
- **Database**: Supabase (Postgres) — caches PR data so pages load instantly
- **Sync**: Browser-triggered background sync via `/api/sync-data` — data is fetched from GitHub API server-side and cached in Supabase. Pages load from DB instantly. Sync runs in background after page load (30-minute throttle).
- **Hosting**: Vercel
- **Analytics**: Vercel Analytics, PostHog (anonymous), Google Analytics

## Data and privacy

- No accounts or sign-up required
- Only public GitHub data is accessed (PR titles, labels, merge status)
- No private repo access
- Email alerts are optional; stored in a plain file in the GitHub repo
- Session replays via PostHog are anonymous (no PII)

## Important disclaimers

- This is an **unofficial** community tool — not affiliated with GirlScript Summer of Code or GirlScript Foundation
- Scores here align with the official formula but the official leaderboard is the authoritative source for rankings
- The Project Admin tracker (https://gssoc-tracker-chi.vercel.app) is a separate deployment built by @Ixotic27

## Links

- Main tracker: https://gssoc-tracker.vercel.app
- PR Validator: https://gssoc-tracker.vercel.app/pr-check

- Source code: https://github.com/PRODHOSH/gssoc-tracker
- Project Admin tracker: https://gssoc-tracker-chi.vercel.app
